ModMetaData.name: 多年生杂交水稻 EBT1 (Perennial Hybrid Rice EBT1)
ModMetaData.author: Jeremie
ModMetaData.description:
《稻田有望像果园 闪耀世界科学家首次发现水稻多年生“长寿基因” EBT1》
---
[通讯台接收信息] 标题： 稻田有望像果园：闪耀世界科学家分离出水稻多年生“长寿基因”EBT1 来源： 新夏星际通讯网，翠象10日（记者张建松、胡喆） “时雨及芒种，四野皆插秧。” 这句古老的诗词描述了水稻传统的、一年生的生命周期。这意味着种植工必须在每一个生长季，煞费苦心地为这些作物重新播种。 如今，闪耀世界科学家在农业领域取得了重大突破，他们发现并克隆了“长寿基因”EBT1。这项基因改造技术创造出了一种多年生高产水稻品种，让种植区能够像果园一样运作 ——只需一次播种，就能为殖民地带来源源不断的持续收获。
---
[English Translation By Gemini 3.1 Pro]
[Comms Console Transmission] Title: Rice Fields to Rival Orchards: Glitterworld Scientists Isolate Perennial "Longevity Gene" EBT1 Source: New Xia Comms Network, 10th of Aprimay (Reporters Zhang Jiansong, Hu Zhe) "When seasonal rains grace the tilled earth, across the fields the seedlings are sown." This ancient poetry describes the traditional, annual life cycle of the rice plant, demanding that growers painstakingly re-sow the crop every single growing season. Today, Glitterworld scientists have achieved an agricultural breakthrough by discovering and cloning the "longevity gene" EBT1. This genetic modification creates a perennial rice strain, allowing growing zones to function much like orchards—requiring only a single sowing for continuous, ongoing harvests.
---
https://www.news.cn/20260320/f6adabd54d70457ba966828a9cbe6b98/c.html
